title: Fix: Unicode handling in string processing
original_text: Fixed Unicode handling in string processing. Non-ASCII characters were being corrupted. Implemented proper UTF-8 encoding/decoding. Added Unicode normalization. Implemented locale-aware string operations. Result: Unicode handling fixed.
expected_subject: fix(i18n): fix Unicode handling in string processing
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(i18n): fix Unicode handling in string processing"
